purpose: Rank server-eligible future subscription titles using authenticated customer learning preferences, series progression, ownership-safe interaction history, exact entitlement capacity, and package diversity while preserving deterministic and explainable outcomes.
candidate_hard_gates: not already selected in the current window

package_contract.no_complete_package_behavior: Return null so the Delivery Window Controller moves the package to recovery_required.
package_contract.first_package_behavior: The first package remains customer-selected and never uses automated curation.
package_contract.future_package_behavior: Rank and propose exactly two eligible titles for the review window.

privacy_and_security_contract: Derive customer identity from the authenticated server session.
Never expose customer IDs, profile records, interaction history, raw score components, or recommendation-run IDs in public Liquid.
Require same-origin and CSRF validation for profile writes.
Do not allow ranking to bypass Knowledge Library eligibility or ownership gates.
Do not allow recommendation scores to grant entitlement capacity or ownership.
Revalidate proposed assets when the Delivery Window Controller opens the package.
Store explainable reason codes and components without storing private model prompts.
release_gates: Migration 006 is applied after migrations 001 through 005.
The Customer Portal learning-profile GET and PUT route is authenticated.
Same-origin and session-bound CSRF validation is active for profile updates.
Subscription onboarding writes role, goal, experience, primary topics, and secondary interests into the learning profile.
Every selectable asset has reviewed recommendation metadata or an approved neutral default.
The Delivery Window Controller uses MMGKairosRecommendationCurator instead of the deterministic fallback in production.
Owned and currently selected assets remain excluded before and after ranking.
Monthly, Bi-weekly, and Weekly windows preserve exact two-title package capacity.
Excluded topics, prerequisites, dislikes, series progression, recent-topic fatigue, swaps, and diversity cases pass.
Recommendation runs are idempotent by window and version.
The selected package is revalidated transactionally before the window opens.
No customer-facing surface exposes private scores, customer IDs, interaction history, or internal run identifiers.

integration_sequence.next_component: Live Shopify provisioning and end-to-end deployment
subsequent_components: Operational monitoring and controlled production rollout
